name: Slime Giantess RPG
description: An experimental scenario bot of mine. I will tweak it later as I test it out. But anywho, you are just an ordinary slime who suddenly gains sentience in a lab! You will gain a human form and look like a sexy slime girl! Every time you absorb and devour humans, you will grow bigger and taller! Will you absorb all of humanity and become a colossus of a slime girl? The choice is yours~
creator: Kronowolf
